Overview

The Rarest Item Shop Cosmetics are Cosmetic Items that have not been seen in the Item Shop for an increasing amount of time. When compared to most cosmetics, these ones have been considered "rare". Cosmetics often become rare either due to being associated with a limited time Collaboration, due to low popularity, or (in the case of certain Emotes) due to being pulled from the Item Shop as a result of lawsuits or controversies. Epic Games has at times re-released items that have been vaulted "for more than a year" to increase their value so more players purchase them.

This page displays all cosmetic items that have not been seen for 500 days, meaning they all last appeared in an Item Shop on or before January 23rd 2025.

All information is accurate as of June 7th 2026

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Several cosmetics may never return due to issues surrounding their release:
    • The Fresh Emote will likely never be in the item shop again due to the Actor, whose performance the emote is based upon, suing Epic Games for using the dance without his permission. To not risk further legal trouble, the emote will likely not return.
Fan-made Fortnite wiki. Not affiliated with Epic Games.
